IndianService.title: Indian Service Portal
IndianService.description: Information about official government portals for jobs, results, and admit cards.

description.description: Brief description of what the portal offers.

url.description: The official link to the portal.

category.description: The specific category of the service.

state.description: The state this service belongs to, or 'All India'.

isPopular.description: Whether this is a high-traffic trending portal.

imageUrl.description: URL for the portal logo or representative image.

lastDate.description: The last date for application or result check (e.g. 11-06-2026).

applicationFee.description: Details about the application fee structure.

ageLimit.description: Information about minimum and maximum age constraints.

totalPosts.description: The total number of vacancies available.

AppConfig.title: App Configuration
AppConfig.description: Global settings for the application UI.

heroImageUrl.description: The main hero banner image URL.

TickerConfig.title: Ticker Messages
TickerConfig.description: Messages for the scrolling marquee with optional links.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Collection of official Indian government service portals. Publicly readable.

/config/tickerMessages.description: Scrolling ticker configuration with names and clickable URLs.
